message:
test(command,store): add comprehensive edge-case and expiry contract tests

Significantly expands test coverage for the Redis-compatible command dispatch
and key-value store layers with focus on error paths and TTL/expiry semantics:

Command layer (fr-command):
- dispatch_invalid_utf8_command_name_errors: verify non-UTF8 command bytes
  produce InvalidUtf8Argument, not a panic or wrong error
- mset_odd_arg_count_errors_wrong_arity: verify MSET with odd arg count
  is rejected atomically (no partial writes, sentinel key preserved)
- expired_keys_become_invisible_to_get_keys_dbsize_and_ttl: end-to-end
  test that expired keys are invisible across GET, KEYS, TTL, and DBSIZE
  simultaneously, not just individually
- case_insensitive_commands: expand from single pair to 4 casing variants
  (lowercase, UPPER, MiXeD, sEt/GeT) to catch case-folding regressions
- expire_invalid_integer_argument_errors: parametric test over 5 invalid
  integer forms ("", "not-a-number", "1.5", "+-2", overflow) verifying
  InvalidInteger error without mutating the key's value

Store layer (fr-store):
- expire_missing_key_returns_false: verify expire_seconds, expire_milliseconds,
  and expire_at_milliseconds all return false for nonexistent keys
- non_positive_expire_values_delete_immediately_property: parametric test
  that 0 and negative expire values cause immediate key deletion
- rename_retains_expiry_deadline: verify RENAME preserves the exact TTL
  deadline (not just "has a TTL") and the key actually expires at the
  original wall-clock time
- keys_matching_skips_expired_entries: verify the KEYS glob matcher
  filters out expired entries at query time

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
